PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour for Lucy Goodwyn (Petitioner).

Mr. Harbour explained circumstances with respect to how the will was obtained and why he felt he did not have a duty to determine validity of the will. The Court explained that some property was acquired prior to his client marrying the decedent and that it is separate property. The Court also stated that more efforts need to be made to determine if the decedent has a brother or if the brother has any issue, and suggested counsel hire an investigator. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with full authority (order for the same signed in open court). Bond in the amount of $250,000.00 is required.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
